body.title: Granny Weatherwax + Nanny Ogg — ticket gateway/orchestrator and scheduler/world-dispatcher devices
body.text:
# D-granny-nanny-2026-05-28
**title:** Granny Weatherwax + Nanny Ogg — ticket gateway/orchestrator and scheduler/world-dispatcher devices
**date:** 2026-05-28
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-granny-weatherwax-device, T-nanny-ogg-device, T-consequence-granny-nanny
**goal_link:** none: factory-of-factories — autonomous work routing without CC present
**concept_links:** none

## Decision narrative
Two rack devices replace scattered orchestration logic. Granny Weatherwax: ticket gateway + coding orchestrator — rules-based graph routing (ticket tags → capability edges → worker nodes), Hebbian learning on routes, CC escalation for novel/HIGH-inertia cases. Nanny Ogg: scheduler + world-interaction dispatcher — all when/then triggers (cron, gate conditions, consequence maturation, alignment reviews) plus world-interaction ticket dispatch (calendar, social, IoT, new agents). Supersedes T-adc-scheduling-primitive.

## Hypothesis
Work routes to the correct executor without CC present in the common case; Nanny surfaces time-gated tickets and schedules reliably without Igor internals.

## Measurement Signal
Consequence tickets surface on their gate date without CC manually checking; coding tickets route to Igor/Scraps without CC dispatch.

## Goal Link
none: factory-of-factories — autonomous operation; rack routes itself

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: open.
